DeleteNotification API- Failed - Request is query parameters
AddNewNotification API does not validate title length and returns generic database error when arabicTitle or englishTitle exceeds allowed size
AddNewNotification API returns internal conversion error when notificationDate is sent as null
AddNewNotification API accepts invalid notificationDate format (date only) instead of required datetime format
AddNewNotification API accepts null values for optional attachment objects (coverImage, thumbnailImage, file) without validation
DeleteNotification API- Invalid response message although (Delete action implemented successfully)
Token generated for Inactive Client
Delete Firebase account mapped on old table (Devicenotificationsdetails)
AddNewNotification API accepts unsupported image extension (GIF)

pageSize exceeds maximum limit (50) in Get Notifications APIs
Unauthorized user can mark notifications as seen via Set Notifications Seen API
AddNewNotification API sends duplicate notifications to one device and fails for another when user has multiple Firebase tokens
AddNewNotification API sends notifications to duplicate Firebase tokens across different receivers instead of targeting the intended receiver

Notification API – SeenDate Recorded Without Time Zone in Database
DeleteDeviceNotificationsData API returns malformed response when deleting device data using a different client
AddNewNotification API – Notification is not logged in NotificationLog table in Notification Monitor module
AddNewNotification API – Returns incorrect error response format instead of HTTP 500 on server failure
Notifications API – Inconsistent Timestamp Between CreatedDate and SentDate in notificationsfirebaselog Table
Notification APIs – Add Notification API Returns 500 Internal Server Error When Sending Large Receiver IDs Data Without Proper Validation
Notification Module – Get Notifications By Receiver ID & Get Notifications By Application APIs Accept Invalid Date Format Instead of Enforcing ISO 8601
Notification Module – Some APIs Return 500 Instead of 400 When Input Exceeds Database Column Length (Missing Validation on Certain Parameters)
